questionHtml: State, giving a reason, if the product of this reaction exhibits stereoisomerism.
markschemeHtml:
yes AND has a carbon attached to four different groups
OR
yes AND it contains a chiral carbon ✔


Accept yes AND mirror image of molecule different to original/non-superimposable on original.

meta.title: State, giving a reason, if the product of this reaction exhibits stereoisomerism.
